bikes.description: Red Islabike Beinn 24. White and blue spoke reflectors on both wheels. Worn away bar end handle on one side. Mismatched metal pedals. Red bottle cage and red cable lock.
bikes.title: 2012 Islabikes Beinn 24

bikes.description: Silver Series aluminum
bikes.title: 2003 Gary Fisher Advance

bikes.description: Size 56. Bike is a black/red road bike with drop bars that have Sprintech mirrors extending from the ends. An adjustable stem (Satori) is installed on bike. Pedals (Shimano) are flat on one side, with clips on the other. Wheels are locked to bike frame using Pinhead Bicycle Locking Skewers. Bike has a black Topeak rear rack attached. Tires are made by Pirelli.
bikes.title: 2017 Specialized Allez E5 Sport

bikes.description: A “red” electric bike with thermal bag/box at the back (when it was stolen). Small square shape brown bag consist of rain coat dangling at the right side of the back wheel. Both paddle has scratched marks. Handle bar with a small rubber band in mid-axis
bikes.title: 2022 iGo Electric Bikes Core Elite 3D hybrid

bikes.description: Black bike with indigo writing of FUJI on the side. It is a road bike. It has bright purple large pedals and a small metallic purple bell.
bikes.title: 2014 Fuji Absolute 3.0

bikes.description:
Bike is Trek's "Miami Green".
Stolen from garage (locked) betw. afternoon of 9/18/22-9/22/22
Disc brakes, front suspension, dropper seat post, some frame damage on drivetrain side; Garmin rubber-ring mount & bottle cage on handle bar; Crank Bros(?) turq. platform pedals; Ergon grips
bikes.title: 2018 Trek Roscoe 7
2022 Specialized Allez Elite E5 Road Bike

bikes.description: Brand new Standert Kreissage Disc road bike in paceline peach with white accents and blue text. Look Keo Carbon pedals, Sram Force Etap AXS groupset, Vittoria Corsa 28c Tan Wall tires, CeramicSpeed OSPW System Coated pulley.
bikes.title: 2022 Standert Dreissage Disc

bikes.description: There is a significant amount of scraping on the right brake handle and housing from an accident last year. The horn on the bike was also not functioning at the time of the theft.
bikes.title: 2021 Super73 RX

bikes.description:
Matt black aluminium track single speed bike, no brakes or gears. Alpina fork, sugino zen chainring, omnium cranks, skin grows back pink straps, black pedals. Phil wood pink anodised hub, matt black Campagnolo campy Omega rims. Sugino zen chainring omnium cranks Thompson Stem Deda risers / Oury grips Specialized ruby saddle Patrick star & LOVE sculpture dongles on the seat (lol) pink road runner straps / bmx pedals Pink anodised seat post Campy Omega rims - front laced to pink purple Phil wood hub, back I think suntour or campy (silver) Euro cog Low MKII 2014/15 Matt Black 52 Aluminium Alpina track carbon fork
Dent - damage to TT on right hand side, about 8cm indent.
bikes.title: 2015 LOW// MKII

bikes.description: It's a good condition road commuter bike, with lights front and back, with a mud gard.
bikes.title: Genesis Saber KENT

bikes.description: Women's black Colnago CLR bike with a matte finish and the brand is in a glossy black paint. Campagnolo carbon wheels. guessing it is a 2017, but maybe 2016? Added second set of brake levers on handlebars.
bikes.title: 2017 Colnago road

bikes.description: The steel frame is glossy army green with light blue bands in the top, seat and down tube, but also in the fork. The bike was a bit more than 2 years older and in very good conditions. You can find additional information about the bike here (incl. pictures): You can find a picture of the bike at this website: https://www.thelightblue.co.uk/Sport/5LB9R2572G/Robinson-V2-105-R7000
bikes.title: 2020 The Lightblue J.A. Townsend Cambridge Reynolds 725

bikes.description: A 3x8 speed road bike. Says "Giant" in large letters on the side. right downshifter lever is broken off. Has a small bell on the right side.
bikes.title: Giant Escape 1

bikes.description: Had mud flap above rear wheel. Had attachable LED lights on front reflector and rear seat post. Caliper brakes, notably the front pad was very worn. Chain rubbed on front derailleur so it makes clicking sound. Had a Boston Children's parking sticker on main frame. Rear wheel with dent in frame. Clip in pedals.
bikes.title: 2017 Marin Bikes Vincenza Road Bike

bikes.description: Specialized Dolce Women's Road Bike 51 cm black bar tape, clipless pedals
bikes.title: 2016 Specialized Dolce

bikes.description:
Green cruiser bike found stripped on side of road by Alpha House vagrants.  Have listed online for months to find owner.

Electra USA
June on chain guard
Street Ride Series

Bottom bracket:
Made in Taiwan
June-3 stamped
bikes.title: Electra June Street Ride series cruiser

bikes.description: It is mainly a shimano 105 groupset with ultegra brakes. The paint was stripped in the hopes of doing a custom paint job. It has a carbon fiber seat pot. There is a custom cutout on the side of the rear brake cable. It is not originally like that. The wheels are FSA.
bikes.title: 2013 Raleigh Revenio 3.0

bikes.description: Navy blue road cruiser with black front and rear mudguards, rear mounted carrier rack usually equipped with a white pills speaker and right mounted grey and black side saddle.
bikes.title: 2020 Trek Allant+ 7S

bikes.description: Red color frame, yellow lettering with Cannondale going down the diagonal and Cad2 on the upper frame, all in yellow
bikes.title: Cannondale Caad2 Road Bike

bikes.description:
Components:
Frame: yeti SB150 turquoise colours M size (medium size) 2019 (yellow tag at rear triangle) 
Fork: Fox 38 kashima gold coating, orange colour, 180mm travel
Dropper post: 175mm travel rockshox reverb stealth 2020
Wheelset: St swiss EX471 29 inch, 25mm internal width.
Tyres: Front and rear:Maxxis DH casing Assegai 3C, Maxxgrip, 2.5 inch width. 
Cassette: sram XO 50T cassette
Brakes: sram code rsc
Brake rotors:Front: 220mm!!! MAGURA MDR-P DISC BRAKE ROTOR  6-BOLT, 2019
Rear: 200mm MAGURA MDR-P DISC BRAKE ROTOR  6-BOLT
Shock: fox float x2 2019, with oil slick sticker, silver sticker under. 
Bike derailleur: XO 12 speed with red cage. 
Chainring: sram NX 34T with sram Gx crankset 
Stem: Renthal Gold 50mm stem
bikes.title: 2019 Yeti SB150

bikes.description: Steel-blue road bike with brown seat, brown grips, and brown airless tires. Also has a black rack, a Sturmey-Archer 2 Speed internal gear hub, and silver pedals which are flat on one side with an SPD clip on the other. The photo is not of my bike, but mine is almost identical in appearance.
bikes.title: 2015 Schwinn Racer

bikes.description:
A ton of scuffs on either side of the front fork. I recently put on a black metal waterbottle holder on the front fork. Much newer front tire. Rear tire is a continental road tire. White leather saddle with a nickel sized section of leather ripped off around one of the metal pegs that holds the leather on the black plastic. A tiny led blinker on the rear post hanging on what looks like a hairtie. The rubber grip on the right side of the handlebar is always a little bit off of the bar, it slides around a little. Chain probably pretty rusty, I haven't oiled it recently. Either a 2014 or a 2015, I can't remember. LOOKS LIKE A FIXIE BUT ITS AN 3 SPEED INTERNAL HUB! Coaster brakes.

Overall pretty beat up, but I really loved it.
bikes.title: 2014 Schwinn Speedster

bikes.description:
A ton of scuffs on either side of the front fork. I recently put on a black metal waterbottle holder on the front fork. Much newer front tire. Rear tire is a continental road tire. White leather saddle with a nickel sized section of leather ripped off around one of the metal pegs that holds the leather on the black plastic. A tiny led blinker on the rear post hanging on what looks like a hairtie. The rubber grip on the right side of the handlebar is always a little bit off of the bar, it slides around a little. Chain probably pretty rusty, I haven't oiled it recently. Either a 2014 or a 2015, I can't remember. LOOKS LIKE A FIXIE BUT ITS AN 3 SPEED INTERNAL HUB! Coaster brakes.

Overall pretty beat up, but I really loved it.
bikes.title: 2014 Schwinn Speedster

bikes.description: White frame with "academic juug" on the side as well as a red supreme sticker. Seat is brown leather.
bikes.title: 2020 Bilda Road Bike

bikes.description: An older road bike with straight handlebars and a rack on the back. Step-through style
bikes.title: 2005 Devinci Milano

bikes.description: This is an electric bike.  My daughter and her bike were hit by a car and taken to the hospital in an ambulance.  The police left the bike on the side of the road and someone took it.  We believe the thief will soon be looking to get it repaired and will try to get a key for the lock and a new charger. If someone brings in a Raleigh Redux IE bike (electric) to be repaired or yo get those parts can you contact us?
bikes.title: 2018 Raleigh Redux IE

bikes.description: Road bike. Very light. Says ALUXX 6000 SERIES BUTTED TUBING on side on top bar.
bikes.title: 2009 Giant FCR1 ALUXX 6000 SERIES BUTTED TUBING

bikes.description:
Black 2017 20" Trek FX 2 with sky blue accents along the frame. There are front and back black Planet Bike fenders attached to the bike. 

Other defining features:
- Yellow road paint lightly splattered on the under side of the frame
- Bent metal support on rear fender
- Rusting in the handle bar bolts
- Reflector hanging off of right pedal
- Light mount on the handle bars and below the seat
bikes.title: 2018 Trek FX 2

bikes.description:
Large orange cargo bike with foot rests in the back where cargo (or a person in this case, would sit).

Scratches on derailers with chipped paint from accident, seat pointed upwards from being loose and battery is not attached.

            SERIAL # IS BEHIND FRONT HEADLIGHT
bikes.title: 2019 Rad Power Bikes JB-TDE28Z cargo bike rear

bikes.description: Wonderful women's specific race bike stolen from my home. Purple handle bar tape with matching purple hubs. Sticker on top tube that says "Phoenix Cycling Systems" (see photo). Has a decorative top cap with the image of a fried egg.
bikes.title: Trek Madone OCLV 3.1

bikes.description:
It's the aluminum frame 2017 Cannondale Synapse model with disc brakes. The frame size is 48 cm.

The Shimano 108 brake lever nameplates on both the left and right-hand sides should be slightly scuffed from falls. 

The bar wrap tape on the left side should be loose. 

It's got the garmin speed and cadence sensor on it and black PD R540 road bike pedals on it. 

When stolen, the front wheel was 25x700 and the rear wheel was 28x700.
bikes.title: 2017 Cannondale Synapse Disc 5 105

bikes.description:
The bike is a large-frame hardtail with a red, grey and black design. It has Rockshox forks with red lettering, the front tyre is Cube's own with again, red and grey design. The back wheel is a DT SWISS replacement in black with white lettering.

The pedals are metal MTB pedals made by 'Stolen Bike Co' (the irony!), handlebar is black by Easton Monkey Bar. There is a 'pop-loc' feature for the suspension system with the trigger on the handlebar. 

The saddle is black and a ladies fit with a quick-release mechanism on the seat post to raise or drop the saddle. 

Tyres are grey and chunky, there's a bike bell on the left side and a black and blue torch-like light on the right. There's a bottle holder on the frame along with a mini pump clip and pump, if it's still there. 
There are a few scratches and dings on the frame - a sign of a well-used and loved bike.
bikes.title: 2013 Cube Acid

bikes.description:
MY PK RIPPER HAS BEEN STOLEN HERE NEAR A BIKE TRAIL NEAR HART PARK.IVE HAD THIS BIKE SINCE NEW AND ITS VERY SENTIMENTAL TO ME. IF ANYBODY SEES IT FINDS IT FOR SALE, PARTS BEING SOLD SEPERATELY, OR SEE IT SOMEWHERE MESSAGE ME. I WAS ON THE SIDE OF THE ROAD NEAR CALM, AND NEAR LAKE MING. THIS IS KERN COUNTY BTW.
SERIAL NUMBER: PK71705
Possible police number: 2387280
It had SE Powerwing Bars Repop
Black Oakley 3 Grips
Baby Blue and Brown outline of letters
Camo Padset
Black Uni Seat
Polished Profile Bottom Bracket
Black Tioga Comp III Tires With Black Skyway Graphite Mags
20x 1 3/8 wheels, power lite polished
Gold Dia Compe Seat Clamp
Black n Gold D.I.D Chain
Black Dia Compe MX1000 Brake
SE Crankset Polished
Black 44T Redline Sprocket 
16T Freewheel
Gold Ruf Neck Stem
Tange Headset Chrome
Black Xpedo Platform pedals
Black Shimano Brake Line
Tektro Brake lever
Also had 20x 1 3/8 wheels but it wasn’t on the bike at the time
NOTE: the vintage pk ripper got stolen, the newer one (the one with me in the picture) has 20 x 1 3/8 wheels that were also with the old PK the time it got stolen so I included it with the photos if the bike could look like that also
All I could remember...
bikes.title: 1984 SE Bikes PK Ripper Looptail

bikes.description: Red Gripped with MS 150 stickers on the stem. Minor rock strike on too frame on right side of bike just behind ACR wording. Gray Look pedals. Gator Skin Tires. Cateye Strada. Fuji Altair 2 custom butted aluminum Integrated 1 1/4" lower head tube, BB-30 bb shell, Overlize seat tube, Double water bottle mounts. Rear triangle: Fuji C-4 carbon seat stays, Altair 2 aluminum ETC chain stays, Forged road dropout with replaceable derailleur hanger,
bikes.title: 2010 Fuji Roubaix Acr 2.0

bikes.description: This was my beloved road bike. I want it back!!!
bikes.title: 2007 Trek Madone 5.1 WSD

bikes.description: Alpha Silver Aluminum
bikes.title: 2012 Trek 7000

bikes.description: Serial listed as: xxxxx13 E 1391 but the serial is the WTU# shown in photo
bikes.title: Trek Madone 2.0

bikes.description: My bike is a white specialized dolce elite road bike with a carbon seat post. It has black writing on the side and the handle bars are white. It fits someone who is about 5'7
bikes.title: Specialized Dolce Elite

bikes.description: Hot pink women's cannondale bike. non-road bike handlebars, water bottle holder in the middle.
bikes.title: 2020 Cannondale Quick Disc 4

bikes.description: Black Specialized Allez Elite road bike with purple lettering "Specialized". Has Shimano 105 components and SPD clipless pedals. Scratched front fork and torn tape on the left side from a crash.
bikes.title: 2019 Specialized Allez Elite

bikes.description: White road bike with red accent, black seat and handlebar wrap.
bikes.title: 2011 Novara Strada

bikes.description: It is a Bianchi C2C Via Nirone, 54 cm alluminum frame road bike with electric blue/turquoise handlebar tape and black (very narrow) rear rack. Pedals were dual sided with one clip and one flat side and bike had two black water bottle cages. Generally in good shape with some minor scratches (and a rear brake that could use some tightening). When stolen it had a neon green Epic (bike shop) water bottle and a small black handlebar bag with a clear pocket to hold a phone.
bikes.title: 2009 Bianchi C2C Via Nirone
